title: Discover files in Auto Loader efficiently using file events without enrollment (Public Preview)
body:
The `cloudFiles.useManagedFileEvents` option with Auto Loader is now in ungated Public Preview. This option allows you to discover files efficiently. For details, see the following:

* [(Pre-requisite) Enable file events for an external location](/aws/en/connect/unity-catalog/cloud-storage/manage-external-locations#file-events)
* [File notification mode with and without file events enabled on external locations](/aws/en/ingestion/cloud-object-storage/auto-loader/file-notification-mode#compare)

ref_links.text: (Pre-requisite) Enable file events for an external location
File notification mode with and without file events enabled on external locations
